title: Hacker group threatens to release Grand Theft Auto VI data in Rockstar Games attack
summary: The group named ShinyHunters have accessed a third party server and have given the company a deadline of 14 April to enter ransom negotiations Rockstar Games, the studio behind Grand Theft Auto, has been the target of a cyberattack for the second time in three years.
